bhujā
1 The arm; nihitabhujālatayaikayopakaṃṭhaṃ  Śi. 7. 71. 
2 The hand.
3 The coil of a snake (bhoga).
4 Winding.
Comp.
— kaṃṭaḥ a fingernail.
— dalaḥ the hand.
— madhyaḥ
1 the elbow.
2 the breast.
— mūlaṃ the shoulder.
